description:
Protect yourself & your family  with the dual benefits of iShield health & life combi insurance policy from ICICI Lombard and ICICI Prudential.

It is a Combination of ICICI Lombard Health AdvantEdge & ICICI Prudential iProtect Smart Life Insurance.

In this video , we have covered all the features, exclusions & premiums of both Life & Health Insurance policy.

Watch the complete video for more details :)

To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/

✅ ICICI Lombard Health AdvantEdge 2022 : https://youtu.be/6CRPAw2si54
✅ Term Insurance Exclusions in India  : https://youtu.be/myvmeCNsnNs
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
For any queries:
📲 WhatsApp : https://wa.me/message/VJCYEKX3EWHOE1
📞 Call : 9650706699
💌  Mail us at: info@hareepatti.com

comments.text:
I already have ICICI “iPru Protect” Term plan and Bajaj “Health Guard”.

2. Apart from the benefit of managing single policy in iShield, is there any other benefit (lower premium etc) ? Do I lose anything if I purchase them separately ?

3. ICICI Health Advantedge offers global coverage for SI >=25lakh. Is it available in iShield as well ?

4. What if 4 years later, I need to port out of Health Advantedge ?
